creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Fix pkg-plist:
- %%DATADIR%%/4.4/app-defaults/Gnuplot is not installed when WITHOUT_X11 is set.
- Wrap share/texmf-local and its subdirectories with %%TETEX%%

Port maintainer (glewis@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

How-To-Repeat: 
% cd /usr/ports/math/gnuplot
% make WITHOUT_TETEX=yes WITHOUT_X11=yes package
...
===>   Registering installation for gnuplot-4.4.0
===>  Building package for gnuplot-4.4.0
Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/gnuplot-4.4.0.tbz
Registering depends: gd-2.0.35_7,1 freetype2-2.3.12 pkg-config-0.23_1 jpeg-8_3 png-1.4.3 pdflib-perl-7.0.4 perl-threaded-5.10.1.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/gnuplot-4.4.0.tbz'
tar: share/gnuplot/4.4/app-defaults/Gnuplot: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/math/gnuplot.

% make WITHOUT_TETEX=yes WITHOUT_X11=yes deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for math/gnuplot
===>   Deinstalling gnuplot-4.4.0
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/gnuplot/4.4/app-defaults/Gnuplot' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/texmf-local/tex/latex/gnuplot' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/texmf-local/tex/latex/gnuplot'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
